description_long: This is a modern electric locomotive painted in a maroon, white, and black livery with the LNER logo prominently displayed on the side. The locomotive features a streamlined front with a sloped windshield and yellow warning panel, typical of British mainline trains. On the roof, there are visible pantographs and electrical equipment, indicating it is powered by overhead wires. The body is long and rectangular, with several access panels and grilles along the sides, and a series of rectangular windows near the front cab. The undercarriage includes detailed bogies and wheel assemblies, and the rear is squared off with additional technical components. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for high-speed intercity passenger service.
description: A modern LNER electric locomotive with a maroon, white, and black color scheme, streamlined front, roof-mounted pantograph, and detailed side panels and windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sloped windshield, yellow warning panel, and roof-mounted pantograph equipment.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the locomotive, LNER branding, side panels, and window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the squared-off back, roof details, and undercarriage components.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar features to view 1, including the LNER logo and technical roof equipment.
attribute_window_arrangement: rectangular windows near the front cab
